title: Turkish Boregi Bites
description: Delicate Turkish boregi filled with cheese and wrapped in flaky tortillas, perfect as a snack.
instructions: Cut the tortillas into squares, about 4 inches per side.
In a bowl, mix together the feta cheese, chopped parsley, salt, and black pepper.
Brush the su on a tortilla square, then place a small spoonful of the cheese mixture in the center.
Fold the tortilla into a triangle, pressing the edges to seal.
Repeat with the remaining tortillas and cheese mixture.
Place the boregi bites on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
Serve warm, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
